title: W. Christopher Waddell
extract: Wayne Christopher Waddell is an American religious leader who has served as presiding bishop of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints since November 14, 2025. Waddell succeeded Gérald Caussé, who was named to the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles on November 6, 2025. Waddell was called as a church general authority in 2011, Beginning in 2015, he served in the Presiding Bishopric under Caussé, with both five years as second counselor (2015–2020) and five years as first counselor (2020–2025).
extract_html: Wayne Christopher Waddell is an American religious leader who has served as presiding bishop of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints since November 14, 2025. Waddell succeeded Gérald Caussé, who was named to the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles on November 6, 2025. Waddell was called as a church general authority in 2011, Beginning in 2015, he served in the Presiding Bishopric under Caussé, with both five years as second counselor (2015–2020) and five years as first counselor (2020–2025).
